lines.speaker: 主持人
lines.chinese: 欢迎收听我们的节目。今天我们要选出最恩爱夫妻。
lines.pinyin: Huānyíng shōutīng wǒmen de jiémù. Jīntiān wǒmen yào xuǎn chū zuì ēn'ài fūqī.
lines.english: Welcome to our program. Today we will select the most loving couple.

lines.speaker: 主持人
lines.chinese: 第一对夫妻，请说说你们的故事。
lines.pinyin: Dì-yī duì fūqī, qǐng shuōshuo nǐmen de gùshì.
lines.english: First couple, please tell us your story.

lines.speaker: 妻子
lines.chinese: 我生病了，医生说我站起来的可能性很小。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shēngbìng le, yīshēng shuō wǒ zhàn qǐlái de kěnéngxìng hěn xiǎo.
lines.english: I got sick, and the doctor said there was little chance I could stand up again.

lines.speaker: 丈夫
lines.chinese: 我带着她找了很多家医院，一直鼓励她。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ dàizhe tā zhǎo le hěn duō jiā yīyuàn, yìzhí gǔlì tā.
lines.english: I took her to many hospitals, always encouraging her.

lines.speaker: 妻子
lines.chinese: 在他的帮助下，我终于又站了起来。
lines.pinyin: Zài tā de bāngzhù xià, wǒ zhōngyú yòu zhàn le qǐlái.
lines.english: With his help, I finally stood up again.

lines.speaker: 主持人
lines.chinese: 第二对夫妻，请说说你们的婚姻生活。
lines.pinyin: Dì-èr duì fūqī, qǐng shuōshuo nǐmen de hūnyīn shēnghuó.
lines.english: Second couple, please tell us about your married life.

lines.speaker: 妻子
lines.chinese: 十几年来，我们从来没有红过脸、吵过架。
lines.pinyin: Shí jǐ nián lái, wǒmen cónglái méiyǒu hóng guo liǎn, chào guo jià.
lines.english: For over ten years, we have never blushed or argued.

lines.speaker: 丈夫
lines.chinese: 我们一直相亲相爱、相敬如宾。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen yìzhí xiāngqīn-xiāng'ài, xiāngjìng-rúbīn.
lines.english: We have always loved and respected each other.

lines.speaker: 主持人
lines.chinese: 第三对夫妻呢？请进来。
lines.pinyin: Dì-sān duì fūqī ne? Qǐng jìnlái.
lines.english: What about the third couple? Please come in.

lines.speaker: 妻子
lines.chinese: 小声点，我丈夫睡着了。他昨晚没睡好。
lines.pinyin: Xiǎoshēng diǎn, wǒ zhàngfu shuìzháo le. Tā zuówǎn méi shuì hǎo.
lines.english: Keep your voice down, my husband fell asleep. He didn't sleep well last night.

lines.speaker: 评委
lines.chinese: 我们得听你们的叙述啊。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen děi tīng nǐmen de xùshù a.
lines.english: We need to hear your story.

lines.speaker: 妻子
lines.chinese: 那我们就不参加了。
lines.pinyin: Nà wǒmen jiù bù cānjiā le.
lines.english: Then we won't participate.

lines.speaker: 丈夫
lines.chinese: （醒来）不好意思，我家住一楼，蚊子多。昨晚我一直在为老婆赶蚊子。
lines.pinyin: (Xǐng lái) Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒjiā zhù yī lóu, wénzi duō. Zuówǎn wǒ yìzhí zài wèi lǎopo gǎn wénzi.
lines.english: (Waking up) Sorry, we live on the first floor, there are many mosquitoes. Last night I was chasing mosquitoes away for my wife.

lines.speaker: 主持人
lines.chinese: 最后，评委们把最恩爱夫妻奖给了第三对夫妻。
lines.pinyin: Zuìhòu, píngwěimen bǎ zuì ēn'ài fūqī jiǎng gěi le dì-sān duì fūqī.
lines.english: Finally, the judges gave the most loving couple award to the third couple.

title.english: Leaving a Bunch of Keys to Parents

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 儿子，你什么时候搬家？
lines.pinyin: Érzi, nǐ shénme shíhou bānjiā?
lines.english: Son, when are you moving?

lines.speaker: 儿子
lines.chinese: 下周六。东西都准备好了。
lines.pinyin: Xià zhōu liù. Dōngxi dōu zhǔnbèi hǎo le.
lines.english: Next Saturday. Everything is ready.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 你一个人住，我有点儿担心。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ yí ge rén zhù, wǒ yǒudiǎnr dānxīn.
lines.english: I'm a bit worried about you living alone.

lines.speaker: 儿子
lines.chinese: 妈，我都二十五岁了，您放心吧。
lines.pinyin: Mā, wǒ dōu èrshíwǔ suì le, nín fàngxīn ba.
lines.english: Mom, I'm 25 already, don't worry.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 这串钥匙给你，这是我们家门的钥匙。
lines.pinyin: Zhè chuàn yàoshi gěi nǐ, zhè shì wǒmen jiā mén de yàoshi.
lines.english: Here's a key, this is the key to our house.

lines.speaker: 儿子
lines.chinese: 给我钥匙干什么？您不是有钥匙吗？
lines.pinyin: Gěi wǒ yàoshi gàn shénme? Nín búshì yǒu yàoshi ma?
lines.english: Why give me a key? Don't you have one?

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 万一我们不在家，你也可以进来。
lines.pinyin: Wànyī wǒmen bú zài jiā, nǐ yě kěyǐ jìnlái.
lines.english: In case we're not home, you can still come in.

lines.speaker: 儿子
lines.chinese: 好的，我会好好保管的。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ huì hǎohǎo bǎoguǎn de.
lines.english: Okay, I'll keep it safe.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 有空就回来吃饭，别老在外面吃。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu kòng jiù huílái chīfàn, bié lǎo zài wàimiàn chī.
lines.english: Come back for meals when you have time, don't always eat out.

lines.speaker: 儿子
lines.chinese: 知道了，妈。我会常回来的。
lines.pinyin: Zhīdào le, mā. Wǒ huì cháng huílái de.
lines.english: I know, Mom. I'll come back often.

title.chinese: 人生有选择，一切可改变
title.pinyin: Rénshēng Yǒu Xuǎnzé, Yíqiè Kě Gǎibiàn
title.english: Having Choices in Life Makes Change Possible

lines.speaker: 咨询师
lines.chinese: 你好，请坐。有什么我可以帮你的？
lines.pinyin: Nǐhǎo, qǐng zuò. Yǒu shénme wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ de?
lines.english: Hello, please sit down. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: 小王
lines.chinese: 我最近很迷茫，不知道该选什么工作。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn hěn mímáng, bù zhīdào gāi xuǎn shénme gōngzuò.
lines.english: I've been lost lately, not sure what job to choose.

lines.speaker: 咨询师
lines.chinese: 你有什么兴趣和特长？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu shénme xìngqù hé tècháng?
lines.english: What are your interests and strengths?

lines.speaker: 小王
lines.chinese: 我喜欢画画，也喜欢跟人交流。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan huàhuà, yě xǐhuan gēn rén jiāoliú.
lines.english: I like drawing, and I also like communicating with people.

lines.speaker: 咨询师
lines.chinese: 那你有没有想过做设计或者广告？
lines.pinyin: Nà nǐ yǒu méiyǒu xiǎng guo zuò shèjì huòzhě guǎnggào?
lines.english: Have you thought about doing design or advertising?

lines.speaker: 小王
lines.chinese: 想过，但是我担心收入不稳定。
lines.pinyin: Xiǎng guo, dànshì wǒ dānxīn shōurù bù wěndìng.
lines.english: I have, but I'm worried about unstable income.

lines.speaker: 咨询师
lines.chinese: 人生有选择，一切可改变。只要你努力，一定能成功。
lines.pinyin: Rénshēng yǒu xuǎnzé, yíqiè kě gǎibiàn. Zhǐyào nǐ nǔlì, yídìng néng chénggōng.
lines.english: Life has choices, everything can change. As long as you work hard, you will succeed.

lines.speaker: 小王
lines.chinese: 谢谢您的鼓励，我会好好考虑的。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie nín de gǔlì, wǒ huì hǎohǎo kǎolǜ de.
lines.english: Thank you for your encouragement, I'll think about it carefully.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 今天我给大家讲一个关于孝顺的故事。
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ gěi dàjiā jiǎng yí ge guānyú xiàoshùn de gùshì.
lines.english: Today I'll tell you a story about filial piety.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 孔子的学生子路，家里很穷。
lines.pinyin: Kǒngzǐ de xuésheng Zǐlù, jiālǐ hěn qióng.
lines.english: Confucius's student Zilu was very poor.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 为了让父母吃到米饭，他自己吃野菜。
lines.pinyin: Wèi le ràng fùmǔ chī dào mǐfàn, tā zìjǐ chī yěcài.
lines.english: To let his parents eat rice, he ate wild vegetables himself.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 他常常走到很远的地方背米回来给父母吃。
lines.pinyin: Tā chángcháng zǒu dào hěn yuǎn de dìfang bēi mǐ huílái gěi fùmǔ chī.
lines.english: He often walked far to carry rice back for his parents.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 子路真是一个孝顺的儿子。
lines.pinyin: Zǐlù zhēnshì yí ge xiàoshùn de érzi.
lines.english: Zilu was truly a filial son.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 是的。后来子路的父母去世了。
lines.pinyin: Shì de. Hòulái Zǐlù de fùmǔ qùshì le.
lines.english: Yes. Later Zilu's parents passed away.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 他在楚国做了大官，生活很好。
lines.pinyin: Tā zài Chǔguó zuò le dàguān, shēnghuó hěn hǎo.
lines.english: He became a high official in Chu, living very well.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 但他常常叹息：我还能为父母背米吗？
lines.pinyin: Dàn tā chángcháng tànxī: Wǒ hái néng wèi fùmǔ bēi mǐ ma?
lines.english: But he often sighed: Can I still carry rice for my parents?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 这个故事告诉我们：要趁父母在世时孝顺他们。
lines.pinyin: Zhège gùshì gàosu wǒmen: Yào chèn fùmǔ zàishì shí xiàoshùn tāmen.
lines.english: This story tells us: Be filial to parents while they are still alive.

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 欢迎来到济南。济南以泉水著名，有'泉城'之称。
lines.pinyin: Huānyíng lái dào Jǐnán. Jǐnán yǐ quánshuǐ zhùmíng, yǒu 'Quánchéng' zhī chēng.
lines.english: Welcome to Ji'nan. Ji'nan is famous for its springs, known as the 'City of Springs'.

lines.speaker: 游客
lines.chinese: 这里最有名的泉是什么？
lines.pinyin: Zhèlǐ zuì yǒumíng de quán shì shénme?
lines.english: What's the most famous spring here?

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 最有名的是趵突泉，被称为'天下第一泉'。
lines.pinyin: Zuì yǒumíng de shì Bàotū Quán, bèi chēng wéi 'Tiānxià Dì-yī Quán'.
lines.english: The most famous is Baotu Spring, called 'Number One Spring Under Heaven'.

lines.speaker: 游客
lines.chinese: 为什么叫'趵突泉'？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme jiào 'Bàotū Quán'?
lines.english: Why is it called 'Baotu Spring'?

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: '趵突'是跳跃的意思，因为泉水从地下喷涌而出。
lines.pinyin: 'Bàotū' shì tiàoyuè de yìsi, yīnwèi quánshuǐ cóng dìxià pēnyǒng ér chū.
lines.english: 'Baotu' means jumping, because the spring water gushes up from underground.

lines.speaker: 游客
lines.chinese: 这里的泉水可以喝吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhèlǐ de quánshuǐ kěyǐ hē ma?
lines.english: Can we drink the spring water here?

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 可以，这里的泉水很甜，很多人专门来这里打水。
lines.pinyin: Kěyǐ, zhèlǐ de quánshuǐ hěn tián, hěn duō rén zhuānmén lái zhèlǐ dǎ shuǐ.
lines.english: Yes, the spring water here is sweet, many people come specifically to get water.

lines.speaker: 游客
lines.chinese: 济南还有其他名胜吗？
lines.pinyin: Jǐnán hái yǒu qítā míngshèng ma?
lines.english: Are there other famous places in Ji'nan?

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 还有大明湖和千佛山，都是值得一去的地方。
lines.pinyin: Hái yǒu Dàmíng Hú hé Qiānfó Shān, dōu shì zhídé yí qù de dìfang.
lines.english: There's also Daming Lake and Thousand Buddha Mountain, both worth visiting.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 奶奶，为什么大年三十叫'除夕'？
lines.pinyin: Nǎinai, wèishénme Dànián Sānshí jiào 'Chúxī'?
lines.english: Grandma, why is the 30th of the lunar year called 'Chuxi'?

lines.speaker: 奶奶
lines.chinese: 这是一个古老的传说。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì yí ge gǔlǎo de chuánshuō.
lines.english: This is an ancient legend.

lines.speaker: 奶奶
lines.chinese: 很久以前，有一个怪兽叫'夕'。
lines.pinyin: Hěn jiǔ yǐqián, yǒu yí ge guàishòu jiào 'Xī'.
lines.english: Long ago, there was a monster called 'Xi'.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 怪兽？它做什么坏事？
lines.pinyin: Guàishòu? Tā zuò shénme huàishì?
lines.english: A monster? What bad things did it do?

lines.speaker: 奶奶
lines.chinese: 每年农历十二月三十晚上，它就出来吃人和牲畜。
lines.pinyin: Měi nián nónglì shí'èr yuè sānshí wǎnshang, tā jiù chūlái chī rén hé shēngchù.
lines.english: Every year on the night of the 30th of the 12th lunar month, it came out to eat people and livestock.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 那怎么办？
lines.pinyin: Nà zěnme bàn?
lines.english: Then what?

lines.speaker: 奶奶
lines.chinese: 后来人们发现'夕'怕红色和响声。
lines.pinyin: Hòulái rénmen fāxiàn 'Xī' pà hóngsè hé xiǎngshēng.
lines.english: Later people discovered that 'Xi' was afraid of red and loud sounds.

lines.speaker: 奶奶
lines.chinese: 所以人们就在这天贴红纸、放鞭炮。
lines.pinyin: Suǒyǐ rénmen jiù zài zhè tiān tiē hóngzhǐ, fàng biānpào.
lines.english: So people put up red paper and set off firecrackers on this day.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 原来是这样！所以叫'除夕'。
lines.pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng! Suǒyǐ jiào 'Chúxī'.
lines.english: So that's how it is! That's why it's called 'Chuxi' (getting rid of Xi).

lines.speaker: 奶奶
lines.chinese: 对，'除'就是除掉的意思。
lines.pinyin: Duì, 'chú' jiùshì chúdiào de yìsi.
lines.english: Yes, 'chu' means to get rid of.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 今天我们学习两个成语故事。
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen xuéxí liǎng ge chéngyǔ gùshì.
lines.english: Today we'll learn two idiom stories.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 第一个是'画蛇添足'。
lines.pinyin: Dì-yí ge shì 'Huàshé-tiānzú'.
lines.english: The first is 'drawing a snake and adding feet'.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 有人比赛画蛇，先画完的人给蛇添了脚。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu rén bǐsài huà shé, xiān huà wán de rén gěi shé tiān le jiǎo.
lines.english: Some people competed to draw snakes, and the first to finish added feet to the snake.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 结果反而输了，因为蛇没有脚。
lines.pinyin: Jiéguǒ fǎn'ér shū le, yīnwèi shé méiyǒu jiǎo.
lines.english: As a result, he lost, because snakes don't have feet.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 所以'画蛇添足'意思是做了多余的事？
lines.pinyin: Suǒyǐ 'Huàshé-tiānzú' yìsi shì zuò le duōyú de shì?
lines.english: So 'Hua she tian zu' means doing something unnecessary?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 对。第二个故事是'自相矛盾'。
lines.pinyin: Duì. Dì-èr ge gùshì shì 'Zìxiāng-máodùn'.
lines.english: Correct. The second story is 'contradicting oneself'.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 有个人卖矛又卖盾，说他的矛什么都能刺穿。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu ge rén mài máo yòu mài dùn, shuō tā de máo shénme dōu néng cìchuān.
lines.english: A person selling both spears and shields said his spear could pierce anything.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 又说他的盾什么都刺不穿。
lines.pinyin: Yòu shuō tā de dùn shénme dōu cì bu chuān.
lines.english: He also said his shield couldn't be pierced by anything.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 有人问他用自己的矛刺自己的盾会怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Yǒu rén wèn tā yòng zìjǐ de máo cì zìjǐ de dùn huì zěnme yàng?
lines.english: Someone asked him what would happen if he used his own spear to pierce his own shield?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 是的，他回答不上来了。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, tā huídá bu shànglái le.
lines.english: Yes, he couldn't answer.

vocabulary.english: to draw a snake and add feet (gild the lily)

title.pinyin: 'Zhāo Sān Mù Sì' de Gǔjīn Yì
title.english: Ancient and Modern Meanings of 'Three at Dawn, Four at Dusk'

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 今天我们来讨论'朝三暮四'这个成语。
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen lái tǎolùn 'Zhāo sān mù sì' zhège chéngyǔ.
lines.english: Today let's discuss the idiom 'Zhao san mu si'.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 古时候有人养猴子，早上给猴子三个果子，晚上给四个。
lines.pinyin: Gǔshíhou yǒu rén yǎng hóuzi, zǎoshang gěi hóuzi sān ge guǒzi, wǎnshang gěi sì ge.
lines.english: In ancient times, someone raised monkeys, giving them three fruits in the morning and four at night.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 猴子们很生气，于是他改成早上四个，晚上三个。
lines.pinyin: Hóuzimen hěn shēngqì, yúshì tā gǎi chéng zǎoshang sì ge, wǎnshang sān ge.
lines.english: The monkeys were angry, so he changed it to four in the morning and three at night.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 猴子们就高兴了？
lines.pinyin: Hóuzimen jiù gāoxìng le?
lines.english: Then the monkeys were happy?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 是的，但实际上总数还是七个。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, dàn shíjìshang zǒngshù háishì qī ge.
lines.english: Yes, but actually the total was still seven.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 所以古义是用欺骗的手段蒙蔽别人。
lines.pinyin: Suǒyǐ gǔyì shì yòng qīpiàn de shǒuduàn méngbì biérén.
lines.english: So the ancient meaning is to use deception to fool others.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 那现在的意思呢？
lines.pinyin: Nà xiànzài de yìsi ne?
lines.english: What about the modern meaning?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 现在'朝三暮四'形容反复无常，经常改变主意。
lines.pinyin: Xiànzài 'Zhāo sān mù sì' xíngróng fǎnfù-wúcháng, jīngcháng gǎibiàn zhǔyì.
lines.english: Now 'Zhao san mu si' describes being fickle, often changing one's mind.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 原来古今意思差别这么大。
lines.pinyin: Yuánlái gǔjīn yìsi chābié zhème dà.
lines.english: So the difference between ancient and modern meanings is so big.

vocabulary.english: fickle, capricious (lit. three at dawn, four at dusk)

title.english: The Lu Xun You Don't Know

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 今天我们聊聊鲁迅，一个不一样的鲁迅。
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen liáoliaio Lǔxùn, yí ge bù yíyàng de Lǔxùn.
lines.english: Today let's talk about Lu Xun, a different Lu Xun.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 鲁迅不是写文章很严肃吗？
lines.pinyin: Lǔxùn búshì xiě wénzhāng hěn yánsù ma?
lines.english: Isn't Lu Xun very serious in his writing?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 其实生活中鲁迅很有幽默感。
lines.pinyin: Qíshí shēnghuó zhōng Lǔxùn hěn yǒu yōumò gǎn.
lines.english: Actually in life, Lu Xun had a great sense of humor.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 他喜欢给朋友起外号，也喜欢开玩笑。
lines.pinyin: Tā xǐhuan gěi péngyou qǐ wàihào, yě xǐhuan kāi wánxiào.
lines.english: He liked giving nicknames to friends and making jokes.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 真的吗？能举个例子吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Néng jǔ ge lìzi ma?
lines.english: Really? Can you give an example?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 有一次朋友请他吃饭，他故意迟到了。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu yí cì péngyou qǐng tā chīfàn, tā gùyì chídào le.
lines.english: Once a friend invited him to dinner, and he deliberately arrived late.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 他告诉朋友他路上遇到鬼了，所以晚了。
lines.pinyin: Tā gàosu péngyou tā lùshang yù dào guǐ le, suǒyǐ wǎn le.
lines.english: He told his friend he met a ghost on the way, that's why he was late.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 哈哈，鲁迅真有意思。
lines.pinyin: Hāhā, Lǔxùn zhēn yǒu yìsi.
lines.english: Haha, Lu Xun is really interesting.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 所以他不仅是伟大的作家，也是个有趣的人。
lines.pinyin: Suǒyǐ tā bújin shì wěidà de zuòjiā, yě shì ge yǒuqù de rén.
lines.english: So he was not only a great writer, but also an interesting person.

lines.speaker: 主持人
lines.chinese: 欢迎来到辩论赛决赛。今天的题目是：大学生应该先就业还是先创业？
lines.pinyin: Huānyíng lái dào biànlùnsài juésài. Jīntiān de tímù shì: Dàxuésheng yīnggāi xiān jiùyè háishì xiān chuàngyè?
lines.english: Welcome to the debate finals. Today's topic: Should college students first get a job or start a business?

lines.speaker: 正方
lines.chinese: 我方认为应该先就业。就业能积累经验，为以后创业打好基础。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ fāng rènwéi yīnggāi xiān jiùyè. Jiùyè néng jīlěi jīngyàn, wèi yǐhòu chuàngyè dǎ hǎo jīchǔ.
lines.english: Our side thinks we should first get a job. Employment helps accumulate experience, laying a foundation for future entrepreneurship.

lines.speaker: 反方
lines.chinese: 我方认为应该先创业。年轻是最大的资本，趁年轻去追梦更重要。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ fāng rènwéi yīnggāi xiān chuàngyè. Niánqīng shì zuì dà de zīběn, chèn niánqīng qù zhuī mèng gèng zhòngyào.
lines.english: Our side thinks we should start a business first. Youth is the greatest capital, pursuing dreams while young is more important.

lines.speaker: 正方
lines.chinese: 但创业失败率很高，没有经验的大学生更容易失败。
lines.pinyin: Dàn chuàngyè shībàilǜ hěn gāo, méiyǒu jīngyàn de dàxuésheng gèng róngyì shībài.
lines.english: But the failure rate of entrepreneurship is high, college students without experience are more likely to fail.

lines.speaker: 反方
lines.chinese: 失败也是一种经验。不尝试怎么知道自己不行？
lines.pinyin: Shībài yě shì yì zhǒng jīngyàn. Bù chángshì zěnme zhīdào zìjǐ bù xíng?
lines.english: Failure is also a kind of experience. How do you know you can't do it without trying?

lines.speaker: 主持人
lines.chinese: 双方辩论都很精彩。评委们正在打分。
lines.pinyin: Shuāngfāng biànlùn dōu hěn jīngcǎi. Píngwěimen zhèngzài dǎ fēn.
lines.english: Both sides debated brilliantly. The judges are scoring.

lines.speaker: 主持人
lines.chinese: 结果出来了！双方打成平手，都是冠军！
lines.pinyin: Jiéguǒ chūlái le! Shuāngfāng dǎ chéng píngshǒu, dōu shì guànjūn!
lines.english: The results are out! Both sides tied, both are champions!

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 大家好，今天我们来聊聊闹钟对健康的影响。
lines.pinyin: Dàjiā hǎo, jīntiān wǒmen lái liáoliaio nàozhōng duì jiànkāng de yǐngxiǎng.
lines.english: Hello everyone, today let's talk about the impact of alarm clocks on health.

lines.speaker: 听众
lines.chinese: 闹钟不是帮我们起床吗？怎么会有危害？
lines.pinyin: Nàozhōng búshì bāng wǒmen qǐchuáng ma? Zěnme huì yǒu wēihài?
lines.english: Don't alarm clocks help us wake up? How can they be harmful?

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 突然被闹钟叫醒，心跳会加快，血压会升高。
lines.pinyin: Tūrán bèi nàozhōng jiàoxǐng, xīntiào huì jiākuài, xuèyā huì shēnggāo.
lines.english: Being suddenly woken by an alarm causes heart rate to increase and blood pressure to rise.

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 长期这样可能增加心脏病风险。
lines.pinyin: Chángqí zhèyàng kěnéng zēngjiā xīnzàngbìng fēngxiǎn.
lines.english: Long-term this may increase the risk of heart disease.

lines.speaker: 听众
lines.chinese: 那我们应该怎么起床？
lines.pinyin: Nà wǒmen yīnggāi zěnme qǐchuáng?
lines.english: Then how should we wake up?

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 最好养成规律的作息时间，自然醒。
lines.pinyin: Zuì hǎo yǎngchéng guīlǜ de zuòxī shíjiān, zìrán xǐng.
lines.english: It's best to develop a regular sleep schedule and wake up naturally.

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 如果必须用闹钟，可以选声音柔和的。
lines.pinyin: Rúguǒ bìxū yòng nàozhōng, kěyǐ xuǎn shēngyīn róuhé de.
lines.english: If you must use an alarm, choose one with a gentle sound.

lines.speaker: 听众
lines.chinese: 谢谢医生的建议。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie yīshēng de jiànyì.
lines.english: Thank you for the advice, doctor.

lines.speaker: 记者
lines.chinese: 你好，请问你来自哪个国家？
lines.pinyin: Nǐhǎo, qǐngwèn nǐ láizì nǎ ge guójiā?
lines.english: Hello, which country are you from?

lines.speaker: 外国用户
lines.chinese: 我来自美国，来中国三年了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ láizì Měiguó, lái Zhōngguó sān nián le.
lines.english: I'm from the US, I've been in China for three years.

lines.speaker: 记者
lines.chinese: 你用微信吗？觉得怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ yòng Wēixìn ma? Juéde zěnme yàng?
lines.english: Do you use WeChat? What do you think of it?

lines.speaker: 外国用户
lines.chinese: 用啊，我觉得微信太方便了。
lines.pinyin: Yòng a, wǒ juéde Wēixìn tài fāngbiàn le.
lines.english: Yes, I think WeChat is so convenient.

lines.speaker: 记者
lines.chinese: 你最喜欢微信的什么功能？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zuì xǐhuan Wēixìn de shénme gōngnéng?
lines.english: What feature of WeChat do you like most?

lines.speaker: 外国用户
lines.chinese: 我最喜欢支付功能，买东西不用带钱包。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zuì xǐhuan zhīfù gōngnéng, mǎi dōngxi búyòng dài qiánbāo.
lines.english: I like the payment feature most, I don't need to carry a wallet when shopping.

lines.speaker: 记者
lines.chinese: 你的朋友也用微信吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ de péngyou yě yòng Wēixìn ma?
lines.english: Do your friends also use WeChat?

lines.speaker: 外国用户
lines.chinese: 是的，微信让我们更容易联系。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, Wēixìn ràng wǒmen gèng róngyì liánxì.
lines.english: Yes, WeChat makes it easier for us to stay in touch.

lines.speaker: 记者
lines.chinese: 谢谢你接受采访。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ jiēshòu cǎifǎng.
lines.english: Thank you for accepting the interview.

title.english: Cutting Off the 'Bottom of the Basket' in Life

lines.speaker: 小李
lines.chinese: 最近工作压力很大，我总是担心失败。
lines.pinyin: Zuìjìn gōngzuò yālì hěn dà, wǒ zǒngshì dānxīn shībài.
lines.english: Recently work pressure is high, I'm always worried about failure.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 我给你讲个故事吧。有个人去打篮球。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ gěi nǐ jiǎng ge gùshì ba. Yǒu ge rén qù dǎ lánqiú.
lines.english: Let me tell you a story. Someone went to play basketball.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 他在篮下练习投篮，怎么也投不进。
lines.pinyin: Tā zài lánxià liànxí tóulán, zěnme yě tóu bú jìn.
lines.english: He practiced shooting under the basket, but couldn't make any shots.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 他很着急，觉得自己太差了。
lines.pinyin: Tā hěn zháojí, juéde zìjǐ tài chà le.
lines.english: He was anxious, thinking he was too bad.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 这时教练走过来，把篮底的网剪掉了。
lines.pinyin: Zhèshí jiàoliàn zǒu guòlái, bǎ lándǐ de wǎng jiǎn diào le.
lines.english: Then the coach came over and cut off the net at the bottom of the basket.

lines.speaker: 小李
lines.chinese: 为什么要剪掉篮底？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme yào jiǎn diào lándǐ?
lines.english: Why cut off the basket bottom?

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 教练说：篮底限制了你的发挥。
lines.pinyin: Jiàoliàn shuō: Lándǐ xiànzhì le nǐ de fāhuī.
lines.english: The coach said: The basket bottom limits your performance.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 剪掉篮底后，投篮就变成了一种享受。
lines.pinyin: Jiǎn diào lándǐ hòu, tóulán jiù biànchéng le yì zhǒng xiǎngshòu.
lines.english: After cutting off the bottom, shooting became an enjoyment.

lines.speaker: 小李
lines.chinese: 我明白了，我也要剪掉心中的'篮底'。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ míngbai le, wǒ yě yào jiǎn diào xīn zhōng de 'lándǐ'.
lines.english: I understand, I should also cut off the 'basket bottom' in my heart.

vocabulary.english: to perform, to bring into play

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 欢迎来到北京四合院。
lines.pinyin: Huānyíng lái dào Běijīng sìhéyuàn.
lines.english: Welcome to a Beijing courtyard house.

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 四合院是北京传统建筑，有几百年的历史。
lines.pinyin: Sìhéyuàn shì Běijīng chuántǒng jiànzhù, yǒu jǐ bǎi nián de lìshǐ.
lines.english: Courtyard houses are traditional Beijing architecture, with hundreds of years of history.

lines.speaker: 游客
lines.chinese: 为什么叫'四合院'？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme jiào 'sìhéyuàn'?
lines.english: Why is it called 'siheyuan'?

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 因为房子围成一个四方形，中间是院子。
lines.pinyin: Yīnwèi fángzi wéi chéng yí ge sìfāngxíng, zhōngjiān shì yuànzi.
lines.english: Because the houses form a square, with a courtyard in the middle.

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: '四'是四面,'合'是合在一起。
lines.pinyin: 'Sì' shì sìmiàn, 'hé' shì hé zài yìqǐ.
lines.english: 'Si' means four sides, 'he' means coming together.

lines.speaker: 游客
lines.chinese: 四合院有什么特点？
lines.pinyin: Sìhéyuàn yǒu shénme tèdiǎn?
lines.english: What are the characteristics of courtyard houses?

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 四合院讲究对称，有正房、厢房、倒座房。
lines.pinyin: Sìhéyuàn jiǎngjiu duìchèn, yǒu zhèngfáng, xiāngfáng, dàozuòfáng.
lines.english: Courtyard houses emphasize symmetry, with main rooms, side rooms, and reverse-facing rooms.

lines.speaker: 导游
lines.chinese: 正房朝南，冬天阳光充足，夏天凉快。
lines.pinyin: Zhèngfáng cháo nán, dōngtiān yángguāng chōngzú, xiàtiān liángkuài.
lines.english: The main room faces south, sunny in winter and cool in summer.

lines.speaker: 游客
lines.chinese: 四合院真是中国古代建筑的智慧啊。
lines.pinyin: Sìhéyuàn zhēnshì Zhōngguó gǔdài jiànzhù de zhìhuì a.
lines.english: Courtyard houses really show the wisdom of ancient Chinese architecture.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 今天我们学习成语'纸上谈兵'。
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen xuéxí chéngyǔ 'Zhǐshàng-tánbīng'.
lines.english: Today we learn the idiom 'Zhi shang tan bing'.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 战国时期，赵国有个将军叫赵括。
lines.pinyin: Zhànguó shíqī, Zhàoguó yǒu ge jiāngjūn jiào Zhào Kuò.
lines.english: During the Warring States period, Zhao State had a general named Zhao Kuo.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 他从小学习兵法，谈起打仗头头是道。
lines.pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo xuéxí bīngfǎ, tán qǐ dǎzhàng tóutou-shìdào.
lines.english: He studied military strategy from childhood, speaking about warfare very logically.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 那他一定很厉害吧？
lines.pinyin: Nà tā yídìng hěn lìhai ba?
lines.english: Then he must be very formidable?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 不，他只是纸上谈兵，没有实战经验。
lines.pinyin: Bù, tā zhǐshì zhǐshàng-tánbīng, méiyǒu shízhàn jīngyàn.
lines.english: No, he only talked strategy on paper, without real combat experience.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 第一次带兵打仗，就被秦军打败，四十万赵军投降。
lines.pinyin: Dì-yí cì dàibīng dǎzhàng, jiù bèi Qínjūn dǎbài, sìshí wàn Zhàojūn tóuxiáng.
lines.english: The first time he led troops to battle, he was defeated by the Qin army, and 400,000 Zhao soldiers surrendered.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 所以'纸上谈兵'意思是只会说不会做？
lines.pinyin: Suǒyǐ 'Zhǐshàng-tánbīng' yìsi shì zhǐ huì shuō bú huì zuò?
lines.english: So 'Zhi shang tan bing' means only being able to talk but not do?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 对，形容理论脱离实际，只空谈不实践。
lines.pinyin: Duì, xíngróng lǐlùn tuōlí shíjì, zhǐ kōngtán bù shíjiàn.
lines.english: Yes, describing theory detached from reality, only empty talk without practice.

vocabulary.english: armchair strategy (lit. discussing military on paper)

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 你的体重有些超标，需要注意饮食。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ de tǐzhòng yǒuxiē chāobiāo, xūyào zhùyì yǐnshí.
lines.english: Your weight is somewhat above standard, you need to pay attention to your diet.

lines.speaker: 患者
lines.chinese: 我想减肥，是不是要节食？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng jiǎnféi, shì búshì yào jiéshí?
lines.english: I want to lose weight, should I go on a diet?

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 节食减肥不健康，容易反弹。
lines.pinyin: Jiéshí jiǎnféi bú jiànkāng, róngyì fǎntán.
lines.english: Dieting to lose weight is unhealthy and easy to rebound.

lines.speaker: 患者
lines.chinese: 那应该怎么办？
lines.pinyin: Nà yīnggāi zěnme bàn?
lines.english: Then what should I do?

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 要均衡饮食，少吃油腻和甜食。
lines.pinyin: Yào jūnhéng yǐnshí, shǎo chī yóunì hé tiánshí.
lines.english: You need a balanced diet, eat less greasy and sweet foods.

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 多吃蔬菜水果，适量运动。
lines.pinyin: Duō chī shūcài shuǐguǒ, shìliàng yùndòng.
lines.english: Eat more vegetables and fruits, exercise moderately.

lines.speaker: 患者
lines.chinese: 运动有什么建议吗？
lines.pinyin: Yùndòng yǒu shénme jiànyì ma?
lines.english: Any suggestions for exercise?

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 每周运动三到五次，每次半小时以上。
lines.pinyin: Měi zhōu yùndòng sān dào wǔ cì, měi cì bàn xiǎoshí yǐshàng.
lines.english: Exercise 3-5 times a week, at least half an hour each time.

lines.speaker: 患者
lines.chinese: 谢谢医生，我会按照您的建议做的。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie yīshēng, wǒ huì ànzhào nín de jiànyì zuò de.
lines.english: Thank you doctor, I'll follow your advice.

title.pinyin: Zài Zuì Měihǎo de Shíkè Líkāi

lines.speaker: 小张
lines.chinese: 你看过那部电影吗？结局很完美。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ kàn guo nà bù diànyǐng ma? Jiéjú hěn wánměi.
lines.english: Have you seen that movie? The ending is perfect.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 看了。导演在最美好的时刻结束了故事。
lines.pinyin: Kàn le. Dǎoyǎn zài zuì měihǎo de shíkè jiéshù le gùshì.
lines.english: Yes. The director ended the story at the most beautiful moment.

lines.speaker: 小张
lines.chinese: 是啊，让人回味无穷。
lines.pinyin: Shì a, ràng rén huíwèi-wúqióng.
lines.english: Yes, leaving endless aftertaste.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 生活也是这样，有时候需要学会离开。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó yě shì zhèyàng, yǒu shíhou xūyào xuéhuì líkāi.
lines.english: Life is the same, sometimes you need to learn to leave.

lines.speaker: 小张
lines.chinese: 什么意思？
lines.pinyin: Shénme yìsi?
lines.english: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 在最好的时候结束，留下美好的回忆。
lines.pinyin: Zài zuì hǎo de shíhou jiéshù, liú xià měihǎo de huíyì.
lines.english: End at the best time, leaving beautiful memories.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 不要等到一切都变得不好了才离开。
lines.pinyin: Búyào děng dào yíqiè dōu biàn de bù hǎo le cái líkāi.
lines.english: Don't wait until everything goes bad before leaving.

lines.speaker: 小张
lines.chinese: 这是生活的智慧。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì shēnghuó de zhìhuì.
lines.english: This is the wisdom of life.

title.pinyin: Chōuxiàng Yìshù: Měi Háishì Bù Měi

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 今天我们来讨论抽象艺术。
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen lái tǎolùn chōuxiàng yìshù.
lines.english: Today let's discuss abstract art.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 抽象艺术我看不懂，不知道画的是什么。
lines.pinyin: Chōuxiàng yìshù wǒ kàn bu dǒng, bù zhīdào huà de shì shénme.
lines.english: I don't understand abstract art, I don't know what's being painted.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 抽象艺术不是要画出具体的东西。
lines.pinyin: Chōuxiàng yìshù búshì yào huà chū jùtǐ de dōngxi.
lines.english: Abstract art isn't about painting specific things.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 它用颜色、形状、线条表达情感和想法。
lines.pinyin: Tā yòng yánsè, xíngzhuàng, xiàntiáo biǎodá qínggǎn hé xiǎngfǎ.
lines.english: It uses color, shape, and lines to express emotions and ideas.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 那怎么判断它美不美？
lines.pinyin: Nà zěnme pànduàn tā měi bu měi?
lines.english: Then how do we judge if it's beautiful?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 艺术没有标准答案。
lines.pinyin: Yìshù méiyǒu biāozhǔn dá'àn.
lines.english: Art has no standard answer.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 每个人看同一幅画，感受可能完全不同。
lines.pinyin: Měi ge rén kàn tóng yì fú huà, gǎnshòu kěnéng wánquán bùtóng.
lines.english: Each person looking at the same painting may feel completely different.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 所以艺术是主观的。
lines.pinyin: Suǒyǐ yìshù shì zhǔguān de.
lines.english: So art is subjective.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 对，重要的是你的感受，而不是标准答案。
lines.pinyin: Duì, zhòngyào de shì nǐ de gǎnshòu, ér búshì biāozhǔn dá'àn.
lines.english: Yes, what matters is your feeling, not the standard answer.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 最近你经常加班，要注意身体。
lines.pinyin: Zuìjìn nǐ jīngcháng jiābān, yào zhùyì shēntǐ.
lines.english: You've been working overtime a lot lately, take care of your health.

lines.speaker: 员工
lines.chinese: 谢谢经理关心，我会注意的。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie jīnglǐ guānxīn, wǒ huì zhùyì de.
lines.english: Thank you for your concern, manager. I'll be careful.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 工作重要，但生活也很重要。
lines.pinyin: Gōngzuò zhòngyào, dàn shēnghuó yě hěn zhòngyào.
lines.english: Work is important, but life is also important.

lines.speaker: 员工
lines.chinese: 我明白，但最近项目太多。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ míngbai, dàn zuìjìn xiàngmù tài duō.
lines.english: I understand, but there are too many projects recently.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 要学会平衡工作和生活。
lines.pinyin: Yào xuéhuì pínghéng gōngzuò hé shēnghuó.
lines.english: You need to learn to balance work and life.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 休息好才能工作好。
lines.pinyin: Xiūxi hǎo cái néng gōngzuò hǎo.
lines.english: Only when you rest well can you work well.

lines.speaker: 员工
lines.chinese: 您说得对，我会调整的。
lines.pinyin: Nín shuō de duì, wǒ huì tiáozhěng de.
lines.english: You're right, I'll make adjustments.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 周末有时间和家人出去放松一下。
lines.pinyin: Zhōumò yǒu shíjiān hé jiārén chūqù fàngsōng yíxià.
lines.english: Take time this weekend to relax with your family.

lines.speaker: 讲师
lines.chinese: 大家好，今天我们讨论环境保护。
lines.pinyin: Dàjiā hǎo, jīntiān wǒmen tǎolùn huánjìng bǎohù.
lines.english: Hello everyone, today we discuss environmental protection.

lines.speaker: 听众
lines.chinese: 我们能做些什么呢？
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen néng zuò xiē shénme ne?
lines.english: What can we do?

lines.speaker: 讲师
lines.chinese: 首先，减少使用一次性物品。
lines.pinyin: Shǒuxiān, jiǎnshǎo shǐyòng yícìxìng wùpǐn.
lines.english: First, reduce the use of disposable items.

lines.speaker: 讲师
lines.chinese: 比如购物时带自己的袋子，不用塑料袋。
lines.pinyin: Bǐrú gòuwù shí dài zìjǐ de dàizi, búyòng sùliàodài.
lines.english: For example, bring your own bag when shopping, don't use plastic bags.

lines.speaker: 听众
lines.chinese: 还有什么？
lines.pinyin: Hái yǒu shénme?
lines.english: What else?

lines.speaker: 讲师
lines.chinese: 节约用水用电，随手关灯关水。
lines.pinyin: Jiéyuē yòngshuǐ yòngdiàn, suíshǒu guān dēng guān shuǐ.
lines.english: Save water and electricity, turn off lights and water when not in use.

lines.speaker: 讲师
lines.chinese: 出行时尽量选择公共交通或自行车。
lines.pinyin: Chūxíng shí jǐnliàng xuǎnzé gōnggòng jiāotōng huò zìxíngchē.
lines.english: Choose public transport or bicycle when traveling.

lines.speaker: 听众
lines.chinese: 这些小事真的有用吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhèxiē xiǎoshì zhēn de yǒuyòng ma?
lines.english: Are these small things really useful?

lines.speaker: 讲师
lines.chinese: 每个人做一点点，加起来就是很大的改变。
lines.pinyin: Měi ge rén zuò yìdiǎndiǎn, jiā qǐlái jiùshì hěn dà de gǎibiàn.
lines.english: Everyone doing a little bit adds up to a big change.

lines.speaker: 讲师
lines.chinese: 保护环境，从我做起。
lines.pinyin: Bǎohù huánjìng, cóng wǒ zuò qǐ.
lines.english: Protect the environment, start with yourself.
